narrative:
Olmsted Falls-03-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,293 registered voters, with 54.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.5%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.1 percentage points.
